name: Dragunity Divine Lance
effectText: Equip only to a "Dragunity" monster. It gains ATK equal to its Level x 100, also it is unaffected by Trap effects. During your Main Phase: You can equip 1 Dragon "Dragunity" Tuner from your Deck to the monster equipped with this card as an Equip Spell. You can only use this effect of "Dragunity Divine Lance" once per turn.
